content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 2, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 2, 2026, focused on stabilizing Eliza Cloud infrastructure, optimizing desktop startup performance, and refining sub-agent orchestration. Key achievements include enabling agent web UIs by default, implementing model warmup policies for desktop, and resolving critical routing and billing bugs.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

*   **Cloud Infrastructure & Billing Improvements**
    *   Enabled per-agent web UI by default for provisioned sandboxes ([#8167](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8167)).
    *   Isolated Steward tenant for staging redirects and fixed header pinning ([#8176](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8176), [#8179](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8179)).
    *   Ensured response-token budgets for reasoning models to prevent billing errors ([#8189](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8189)).
    *   Provisioned waifu service-keys and patron chat functionality ([#8150](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8150)).

*   **Desktop Performance & Startup Optimization**
    *   Implemented deferred embedding and post-ready voice model warmup to reduce startup stalls ([#8151](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8151)).
    *   Introduced tray-first, decoupled startup to improve responsiveness ([#8148](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8148)).
    *   Fixed bootstrap issues for fresh clones and improved build processes for private workspace packages ([#8168](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8168), [#8146](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8146)).

*   **Orchestration & Core Logic Refinement**
    *   Closed TOCTOU race conditions in completion-deduplication ([#8161](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8161)).
    *   Improved message routing to prioritize coding tasks over web searches when market terms are present ([#8160](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8160)).
    *   Suppressed leaked task-spawn JSON envelopes from user-facing replies ([#8159](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8159)).
    *   Refactored local inference by removing ~919 lines of dead voice subsystem code ([#8154](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8154)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Orchestration & UI:** [#8190](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8190), [#8182](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8182), [#8181](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8181), [#8180](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8180), [#8178](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8178), [#8175](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8175), [#8171](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8171), [#8169](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8169), [#8166](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8166), [#8158](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8158).
*   **Cloud & Infrastructure:** [#8174](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8174), [#8157](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8157), [#8152](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8152).
*   **Fixes & Chores:** [#8192](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8192), [#8187](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8187), [#8185](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8185), [#8172](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8172), [#8170](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8170), [#8153](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8153), [#8149](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8149).

## CLOSED ISSUES

*   **Cloud & Provisioning Fixes:** Resolved issues with native agent provisioning, KMS failures, and billing/routing regressions ([#8062](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8062), [#8122](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8122)).
*   **Orchestration & Routing:** Fixed sub-agent deliverable truncation, build-intent mis-routing, and stale freshness gates ([#7970](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7970), [#8051](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8051), [#8127](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8127)).
*   **Desktop & Installation:** Addressed prewarm crashes, build chain failures for private packages, and documentation links ([#7991](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7991), [#8143](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8143), [#8173](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8173)).
*   **Inference Profiles:** Resolved nightly local-inference profile issues ([#8063](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8063)).

## NEW ISSUES

*   **Orchestrator Challenges:** Issues regarding sub-agent narration garbling and the need for a richer chat workbench ([#8162](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8162), [#8188](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8188)).
*   **CI & UI:** Failures in resolving `@elizaos/logger` in tests and Storybook rendering blocks for feature-surface components ([#8164](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8164), [#8177](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8177)).

## ACTIVE ISSUES

*   **[#8142](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8142) app-core dist/entry.js externalization:** Discussion centers on whether this is an upstream issue or a consumer-side bundling configuration problem (e.g., Milady-ai). Contributors are debating whether to add `bundleDependencies` to `package.json` or treat it as a tracking issue for the broader bundling strategy.
